productDisplayName: Baggit Women Tijori Taj Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This two-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 10 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette A pouch with a magnetic button closure on the frontA press button closure for securing the main compartmentsSix card holders, one id card holder, two pockets and a key holder on the left foldSix card holders on the right foldOne zippered compartmentA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
